series_metadata.series_title: Medical Transportation Forms for Application and Inspection
series_metadata.series_description: This record series includes applications, supplementary forms, reports, and supporting documents and correspondence created and received during Division of Emergency Medical Service (EMS) / Medical Transportation section transactions for licensure and license renewal.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records including initial and renewal applications and related documents received before February 4, 2020 are maintained by Division of EMS through end of calendar year from date received and an additional four (4) calendar years ; Electronic: Information submitted via Medical Transportation Licensing System (MTLS) on-line application and renewal licensure and inspection reporting system is maintained through current calendar year from effective date an additional (4) calendar years, reviewed and approved destruction by medical transportation staff
